# Scenario: first-prompt-new-session-tty
# Preconditions: no active session; user types plain text.
# Rule (Phase 1 truth table): plain text + no active session -> create session + turn 1 + attempt 1.
# Session ID: ses_01HXYZABCDEF01  (stable across related fixtures)
# Turn ID:    turn_01HXYZABCDEFT1
# Attempt:    attempt_01HXYZABCDEFA1
# Sandbox task ID: bakudo-ses_01HXYZABCDEF01-t1-a1
# Clock:      2026-05-01T12:00:00Z .. 2026-05-01T12:00:18Z
#
# ANSI: minimal (bold + one brand color). See empty-shell.tty.txt for the legend.

\e[36m\e[1mBakudo\e[0m  \e[1mstandard\e[0m  \e[2msession ses_01HXYZ…F01\e[0m  \e[2mrepo bakudo-abox\e[0m

\e[2m> add a richer review surface for sandbox results\e[0m

\e[1mYou:\e[0m add a richer review surface for sandbox results
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Starting new session in \e[1mstandard\e[0m mode.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Planning turn 1 on the host.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Dispatching sandbox attempt in an ephemeral abox worker.
\e[2m       task bakudo-ses_01HXYZ…F01-t1-a1\e[0m
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Sandbox worker started.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker is producing output.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker completed. Reviewing result.
\e[32mBakudo:\e[0m Accepted. 3 files changed and targeted tests passed.

\e[33m[inspect] [inspect provenance] [new] [resume]\e[0m
>
